name: ALP Rebalance Loop
description: Triggers ALP's rebalance tick every 5 minutes against the deployed Cloudflare Worker, then notifies a private Telegram chat when at least one position rebalanced. Suitable for both production and the hackathon demo.

secrets.name: ALP_WORKER_URL
secrets.description: host of the deployed worker, e.g. alp-agent.username.workers.dev

secrets.name: ALP_API_KEY
secrets.description: matches the worker's KEEPERHUB_API_KEY env var

secrets.name: TG_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: from @BotFather (a long string starting with the bot's numeric ID)

secrets.name: TG_CHAT_ID
secrets.description: your private Telegram chat ID (numeric, found via getUpdates)
